notes: Heavy-armor sustainment specialist Unique base — one instance on the map, sited on Plains, no terrain exception. Salvage Works builds Juggernaut, Repair Truck, and Granite Crumbler; Granite Crumbler was previously Fort Irongrad-exclusive and is now shared, same pattern as Juggernaut/Rocket Tank across Tank Plant/Frostworks. No specialty defense building — relies on generic Turret/Missile Launcher plus Walls, same as Kraken Point/Windy Peaks/Sky Fortress. initialGarrison omits Repair Truck (damage 0, empty canTarget — a pure support unit, not a combatant, same reasoning as excluding Engineer/Disruptor/Glider elsewhere).
